children.text: I had a very interesting day on Saturday. We had a picnic in the park.
children.cn: 周六我度过了非常有趣的一天。我们在公园里野餐了。
children.explanation: 文中说 'We had a picnic in the park' 在 'on Saturday'。

children.text: I am sending you some photos. I miss everyone in China.
children.cn: 我正寄给你一些照片。我想念中国的每个人。

children.text: Please write to me soon. Love, Daming.
children.cn: 请尽快给我回信。爱你的，大明。

children.text: In this photo, the sun is shining. The birds are singing in the tree.
children.cn: 在这张照片里，阳光灿烂。鸟儿在树上歌唱。
children.explanation: 文中说 'the sun is shining'（阳光灿烂）。

children.text: We are looking at some ducks. They look hungry.
children.cn: 我们正在看一些鸭子。它们看起来饿了。

children.text: In this photo, it's starting to rain and the birds are flying away.
children.cn: 在这张照片里，开始下雨了，鸟儿正在飞走。

children.text: And just look at this! The ducks are eating our sandwiches!
children.cn: 快看这个！鸭子们正在吃我们的三明治！
children.statement: 鸭子在吃大明他们的三明治。
children.explanation: 文中惊呼 'The ducks are eating our sandwiches!'。
